item.name: Felicitous Furball Card
item.description:
An uncommon (★★) card used in the game Triple Triad.
Card No. 355

en.description: “Ugh, my poor back... Goodness, I'm due for a healthy amount of grease after that ordeal.”

ja.description:
「よっこいニャ……っと……。
ふぅ……、これで準備よしですニャー」
猫型魔法人形：ねこみみさん

de.description: „Schwing dich in die Hängematte, gönn dir eine Kokosnussmilch und lass die Seele ordentlich baumeln!“

fr.description: “Et hop... Fiou... Et voilà, le terrain est prêt<Indent/>!”
